name: S'mores Cake LF
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly butter 2 (8-inch) round springform cake pans or spray with non-stick cooking spray.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together the cake flour, graham cracker crumbs, and baking powder.
3. In another bowl, combine the nonfat milk, applesauce, and vanilla.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring just until blended.
5. Beat the egg whites until frothy. Add the cream of tartar and continue beating until thick and foamy.
6. Gradually add the sugar, beating until soft, smooth peaks form.
7. Fold half of the batter into the mixture until blended.
8. Fold in the remaining egg white mixture until just blended.
9. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans and spread to an even thickness.
10. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Sprinkle the marshmallows and chocolate chips over the tops of the cakes.
12. Place under the broiler until the marshmallows are lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
13. Let cool to warm and serve. Makes 2 cakes, with 16 servings in total. Each serving contains approximately: 136 calories, 169 mg sodium, 1 mg cholesterol, and 2 grams fat.
